note: Warsh is an Expo/React Native app, not a web design-system library. No Storybook, no consumable component dist (warsh-app/dist is an Expo web export of the whole app). RN components do not render in the Claude Design web runtime. Per user decision 2026-07-18, this sync ships BRAND TOKENS + FONTS only (colors, type scale, spacing, radii, shadows), sourced from warsh-app/constants/theme.ts. No components.
